retrieved_result: Disable the Google app By Marie Black | 24 Apr 2017Recognise this? That's the Google Search bar, and on some Android phones it is set to appear at the top of every home screen, taking up room you'd rather give to app shortcuts. Also see: Best custom Android UIs There are a couple of quick and easy ways to remove the Googl
